summary: Soundboard capture of a sunny 1982 spring tour with a pretty China Cat > Know You Rider sequence and overall joyful vibe.
review: Listeners recall a beautiful spring day at Duke University and describe the show as a joyous entry into the Dead experience, highlighting a very pretty China Cat > Know You Rider stretch. No explicit comments on the recording quality were made, but the .sbd tag suggests a standard soundboard source that is generally clear.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers express enthusiasm for the performance and atmosphere; recording quality is not discussed but the soundboard source implies acceptable fidelity, leading to a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on clarity or mix; assumed typical soundboard quality for this release.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers emphasize the pleasant spring atmosphere and a smooth, enjoyable flow, especially noting the pretty China Cat > Know You Rider segment.
